title: EGYÉNI TANÁCSADÁS A KÖZVETLEN ÉRTÉKESÍTÉSSEL FOGLALKOZÓ MEZŐGAZDASÁGI ÜZEMEKNEK A SAJÁTOS NEHÉZSÉGEKRŐL
description: A guide presenting individual advisory and coaching methods for agricultural operations engaged in direct sales, focusing on overcoming challenges in implementing biosecurity and hygiene measures. It summarizes key insights from pilot trainings in France and suggests scaling the coaching approach to improve disease prevention in diversified, short supply chain farms.
